response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'TOUGH BOY' at 00:00. Searched for 'TOUGH BOY TOM*CAT Japanese and English lyrics'. Found reliable lyrics from AnimeLyrics.com/Genius. Identified 'Long shot' at 03:27. Searched for 'Long shot Vivy -Fluorite Eye's Song- lyrics English translation'. Confirmed song title and artist/franchise from results and constructed lyrics from available sources.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive VTubers Pekora, Korone, IRyS, and Nerissa. The first song is a cover of 'TOUGH BOY' by TOM*CAT, and the second is a cover of 'Long shot' from the anime 'Vivy -Fluorite Eye's Song-'.

scenes.description: Pekora and Korone perform a cover of 'TOUGH BOY' by TOM*CAT. The title appears at the top-left of the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Kono ikareta jidai e youkoso
Kimi wa TOUGHBOY
Matomo na yatsu hodo feel so bad
Shouki de irareru nante un ga ii ze
You, TOUGHBOY
Toki wa masa ni seikimatsu
Yodonda machikado de bokura wa deatta
KEEP YOU BURNING
Kakenukete
Kono akuta to jiyuu to bouryoku no naka wo
NO BOY NO CRY
Susumanakya
Ikioi wo mashita mukaikaze no naka wo
WE ARE LIVING, LIVING IN THE EIGHTIES
WE STILL FIGHT, FIGHTING IN THE EIGHTIES
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome to this crazy time
You are a toughboy
Those who are normal feel so bad
You are lucky to be able to stay sane
You, toughboy
It is now the end of the century
We met by chance at a sluggish street corner
Keep you burning
Run through this cluster of decay, freedom, and violence
No boy no cry
We still fight, fighting in the eighties

scenes.description: Pekora, IRyS, and Nerissa perform a cover of 'Long shot' from 'Vivy -Fluorite Eye's Song-'. The title appears at the top-left of the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tell me what you offer me
Trying not to step back to where I used to belong
Looking for the escape from pain
I will cross my fingers, hoping not to be sacrificed
Ukabiaru shiruetto oikakete
Don't down the reason why I'm standing here alone
Maybe it's already too late to regain
Omae ga shidai de kakageta kibou wo
Nakusu nai de
I won't trace someone else's life
I know who I am
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tell me what you offer me
Trying not to step back to where I used to belong
Looking for the escape from pain
I will cross my fingers, hoping not to be sacrificed
I'll be there
I won't trace someone else's life
I know who I am
